title: Mouse Extermination in Irvington, NY | $350-$600 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional mouse extermination services in Irvington, Westchester. Effective rodent removal for $350-$600. Licensed exterminators serving Irvington homes and businesses. Call today!
intro: Dealing with a mouse infestation in your Irvington home or business? Best Pest Control NYC provides fast, effective mouse extermination services throughout Irvington and Westchester County. Our licensed technicians use proven methods to eliminate mice and prevent future infestations, with services ranging from $350 to $600 depending on the severity of your situation.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has been serving Irvington residents for years with reliable, same-day mouse removal services. Our team understands the unique pest challenges facing Westchester homes, from historic properties near the Old Croton Aqueduct to modern residences along the Hudson River, and we deliver customized solutions with a satisfaction guarantee.
localContext: Irvington's charming tree-lined streets, historic homes, and proximity to the Hudson River create ideal conditions for mice seeking shelter, especially during colder months. Whether you own a Victorian home in the Irvington Historic District or a contemporary property near Matthiessen Park, our experienced exterminators know how to protect your investment from rodent damage.

faqs.question: How much does mouse extermination cost in Irvington?
faqs.answer: Mouse extermination in Irvington typically costs between $350 and $600, depending on the size of your property, the severity of the infestation, and the number of treatments required. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a mouse problem in Irvington?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service to Irvington residents. Once you contact us, we can typically schedule an inspection within 24 hours and begin treatment immediately if needed to quickly address your mouse infestation.

faqs.question: Are your mouse extermination methods safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and methods that are safe for families and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. We take extra precautions in homes with children and animals, and we'll explain all safety measures during your service.

faqs.question: Do you offer guarantees for mouse extermination in Irvington?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We stand behind our work with a comprehensive service guarantee. If mice return between scheduled treatments, we'll come back at no additional charge. We also offer ongoing prevention plans to keep your Irvington property mouse-free year-round.
